item.title: clawhq deploy — unified cloud deployment command
item.intent: clawhq deploy walks a user from zero to a cloud-deployed, SSH-accessible agent in one terminal session. No cloud console, no manual steps. Cost shown before charge. Mid-flight failures auto-clean. Trust mode configured on success. SSH keypair injected at provision so the agent is permanently updatable via FEAT-005.
item.description: Wire the provisioning engine into a user-facing `clawhq deploy` command. Interactive flow: choose provider → enter/confirm credentials → select region → select blueprint → provision → deploy → verify → return URL. Non-interactive mode with flags for CI/automation. Shows cost estimate before confirming. Integrates with existing cloud module (trust modes, heartbeat) for post-deploy monitoring.
steps: Build interactive deploy wizard: provider → credentials → region → blueprint → confirm
Add cost estimation: show monthly cost before provisioning
Post-deploy: auto-configure trust mode (zero-trust default), start heartbeat
Add clawhq deploy status: show all cloud-deployed agents
Add clawhq deploy destroy: teardown with confirmation
acceptanceCriteria: clawhq deploy walks user through cloud deployment end-to-end
Cost shown before confirmation — no surprise bills
Destroy is clean: VM terminated, DNS removed, local state cleaned
